verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a member of the IZUMO family. While IZUMO1 is a well-characterized sperm-surface protein essential for fertilization, IZUMO4 lacks a canonical transmembrane domain and the NCBI summary places it in the nucleus. UniProt Q1ZYL8 describes it as a nuclear protein with no signal peptide or TM region. Unlike IZUMO1/2/3, IZUMO4 does not appear to traffic to the plasma membrane outer leaflet. No documented cancer ecto-display, cell-death surface translocation, or activation-induced surface pool has been reported. The dominant and likely sole localization is nuclear.
